name: Blueberry Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the blueberries with water until smooth. This should make about 2 cups.
2. Combine the blueberry mixture with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl. Stir for several minutes until the sugar has dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a small container and refrigerate until it is no more than 40°F.
4. Pour the chilled mixture into an ice cream machine and churn until frozen.
Note: Vodka adds a nice touch to this sorbet, helping the sugar dissolve evenly for a smoother texture.
